title: carex alpina subsp. infuscata
intro: Carex alpina subsp. infuscata, also known as Alpine Sedge or Infuscate Sedge, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the genus Carex. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Carex alpina subsp. infuscata include its potential to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and aid in the management of fluid retention. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
